_comment: B-15 — Curated allow-list of TruNorth slugs whose primary business is alcoholic beverage manufacture (beer, wine, spirits). Source: public investor disclosures + Wikipedia 'List of largest alcoholic drink companies'. Sub-brands resolve via brand-parent-map. Curated conservatively 2026-06-07.

_format.rationale: <one line: why this brand is an alcohol industry member>

anheuser-busch.rationale: U.S. arm of Anheuser-Busch InBev — largest brewer globally (Budweiser, Bud Light, Stella, Corona US).

molson-coors-beverage.rationale: Molson Coors — Coors, Miller Lite, Blue Moon, Coors Light.

heineken-usa.rationale: U.S. arm of Heineken N.V. — Heineken, Dos Equis, Amstel, Tecate.

diageo.rationale: Global spirits leader — Johnnie Walker, Smirnoff, Guinness, Captain Morgan, Don Julio, Crown Royal.

brown-forman.rationale: U.S. spirits maker — Jack Daniel's, Woodford Reserve, Old Forester, Herradura.

jack-daniel-s-brown-forman.rationale: Brand of Brown-Forman — Tennessee whiskey (parent-linked slug).

budweiser-anheuser-busch-inbev.rationale: Budweiser beer brand of Anheuser-Busch InBev.
